metadata.description: Three manuscript edits: (1) trim H2 wording, (2) remove repeated sentence from Results, (3) investigate and fix citation formatting

summary:
Completed three manuscript edits across all 4 versions (NHB2026, ACM2026, general_manuscript, arxiv):

1. **H2 wording fix**: Removed ", not stylistic," from H2 so it reads "...indicating semantic marginalization." — applied to all 4 versions.

2. **Repeated sentence removal**: Removed "Meanwhile, institutional, technical, and spectacular narratives occupy the broader discursive landscape." from the end of Results section — applied to all 4 versions.

3. **Citation formatting fix**: Diagnosed as natbib issue where bare `\cite{}` produces "Author Year" without parentheses, and manual author names before `\cite{}` caused doubling. Fixed ~37 citations per natbib version (NHB2026 sections and arxiv/main.tex) by converting to appropriate `\citet{}`, `\citep{}`, or `\citeauthor{}`/`\citeyearpar{}` commands. ACM2026 and general_manuscript were unaffected (use numeric/ACM citation styles).

Files modified: NHB2026/sections/introduction.tex, methods.tex, results.tex, discussion.tex; NHB2026/arxiv/main.tex; ACM2026/sections/introduction.tex, results.tex; general_manuscript/sections/introduction.tex, results.tex.
